checks.finding: REQ-001 through REQ-005 state deterministic inputs, decisions, failure behavior, compatibility constraints, and integrity outcomes that TEST-001 through TEST-013 can verify.
Every requirement is explicitly traced to acceptance criteria AC-001 through AC-013.
The acceptance criteria define observable decisions, exact output preservation, exit codes, generated-byte equality, fail-closed behavior, digest states, and post-install outcomes.
Non-goals, the normative 18-target inventory, roles, and build-time/runtime separation bound the scope.
Security, runtime, platform, encoding, matching-order, protected-copy, compatibility, and approval constraints are explicit.
The prior partial-install gap is resolved by fixed-index failure injection, exact prefix/suffix digests, exit 2, complete rollback, all prior digests restored, and post-install verification.
